alternative_terms: Cap escalation at 5% cumulative, annual cadence (market standard for HR Suite).
negotiation_email:
Subject: Contract Terms Review -- TalentBridge HR Suite

Hi team,

As part of our regular contract review, we'd like to revisit a few terms
in our agreement to bring them in line with current market standards:

- Cap escalation at 5% cumulative, annual cadence (market standard for HR Suite).

Based on our projections, this change would save approximately $6,048.00
over the next 36 months. We value our partnership and would like to
discuss these adjustments at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Procurement Team
